nodes.claim_boundary: PASS applies only to the reratified 3-of-3 root boundary. The earlier planned 3-of-5 topology was not proven.

nodes.activation_boundary: WS11 must not be overread as release readiness, verifier widening, or campaign completion.
nodes.claim_boundary: WS11 PASS proves only the bounded keyless public-trust path and monitor plane for the exact WS11 surfaces named in kt_sigstore_integration_receipt.json.
nodes.unlock_basis: WS10 reratified 3-of-3 PASS plus WS10 consistency reseal

nodes.claim_boundary: WS12 PASS proves bounded current-head supply-chain policy and fail-closed TUF attack coverage for the declared pre-release surfaces only.
WS13 PASS proves only the declared CLASS_A and CLASS_B surfaces are locked and reproducible on the same subject head across the declared local and CI environments.

WS14 PASS proves only the bounded static verifier release artifact set and acceptance/distribution policy for the imported current-head keyless public verifier manifest surface, with bootstrap-root-only verifier acceptance.

WS15 PASS proves only a typed claim ABI, deterministic proof ceiling, identity abuse constraints, ledger law, and non-executed release law under the existing reratified 3-of-3 root boundary and bootstrap-root-only verifier acceptance.

WS16 PASS proves only an explicit trust-assumptions register, TEVV pack completeness rules, cryptographically pinned bounded datasets/evidence sets, machine-readable comparator rules, benchmark validity windows, anti-cherry-picking rules, and replayability requirements for the already-bounded truth-barrier and verifier surfaces.

WS17A PASS proves only a secret-free outsider-verifiable assurance replay of the bounded imported public_verifier_manifest surface; it is assurance-only and does not overread into capability, verifier widening, release readiness, or campaign completion.

WS17B PASS proves only one outsider-verifiable capability replay of the historical bounded frontier/readjudication bundle on subject head b4789a5. It does not upgrade that historical audited target into current-head capability, does not widen verifier coverage, and does not prove release readiness, release ceremony execution, or campaign completion.

semantic_boundary.lawful_current_claim: WS17B proves one outsider-verifiable capability replay of the historical bounded frontier/readjudication bundle on subject head b4789a5 only. It does not upgrade that historical audited target into current-head capability, does not widen verifier coverage, and does not prove release readiness, release ceremony execution, or campaign completion.
